actionUnits.condition: Validate attached scripts and events for Hourglass PrefabInstance (fileID: 1993477995). MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1053131476719109107) maps to script GUID 064a8dd92b340ea44b0dfedc7cf8e7b8 (Hourglass) with fields: HourglassTop=7569206847018913496, HourglassBottom=8636883280516482818, TimerFill=1, ParticleSand=1196784834592761554. MonoBehaviour_1 (id: 3259508153452503771) maps to script GUID 35ffe483d6934704b884767450fd49e5 (XROffsetGrabbable/XRGrabInteractable). All XR interaction UnityEvents (m_OnFirstHoverEnter, m_OnHoverEnter, m_OnHoverExit, m_OnLastHoverExit, m_OnSelectEnter, m_OnSelectExit, m_OnActivate, m_OnDeactivate) have empty m_Calls, so no manual UnityEvent invocations are required. Object has Rigidbody => eligible for Transform-based interaction to exercise Hourglass.Update branches.

Enter the trigger volume of Door 1 to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerEnter(Collider). Scene meta confirms: BoxCollider (id: 1635398364) with m_IsTrigger=1; MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1635398365) uses script GUID a8a2c5194e4c1f1458096e7bee47220e (DoorAnimationEvent). On enter when isOpened == false, openDoors() sets isOpened=true and Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger") (Animator component id: 1635398366).

Exit the trigger volume of Door 1 to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerExit(Collider). When isOpened == true, script calls Invoke("closeDoors", 0.5f) which sets isOpened=false and Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger"). Wait >=0.5s to validate delayed close.

Enter Door 2's trigger to invoke both MonoBehaviours via Unity physics. Scene meta confirms: BoxCollider (id: 353440280) with m_IsTrigger=1; MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 353440281) maps to script GUID a8a2c5194e4c1f1458096e7bee47220e (DoorAnimationEvent) and will run OnTriggerEnter -> openDoors() -> Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger"). MonoBehaviour_1 (id: 353440283) maps to script GUID 3dc13bc17e982d54e848fac3441c08c4 (AudioTrigger) and will run OnTriggerEnter -> audioSource.Play() (audioSource fileID: 1941851346). Animator component exists (component id: 353440282).

Exit Door 2's trigger to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerExit(Collider). Since isOpened == true after the enter step, script calls Invoke("closeDoors", 0.5f) leading to closeDoors() -> Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger"). Wait >=0.5s within this step to validate delayed close.

Validate AudioTrigger.Update branch that stops audio. Requirement: keysPlaced (fileID: 2046914207, component type keyMainScript) has numKeys == 3. When this condition becomes true, AudioTrigger.Update will execute audioSource.Stop(). Provide keysPlaced component details or a public no-arg method to set numKeys=3, or ensure environment precondition sets numKeys to 3.
